title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 33.065 - Obligations incurred, when
text:
33.065.  Obligations incurred, when. — No appropriation shall confer authority to incur an obligation after the termination of the fiscal year to which it relates.
(L. 1959 S.B. 184 § 1, A.L. 1980 S.B. 517, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1965)
